tasks.intent:
Set up location and price filters on BoatTrader private seller page. CRITICAL: Do NOT call done() in your first step - you must actually interact with the filters first.

WHAT TO CLICK:
- ZIP CODE input field: white text box that may show 'Enter ZIP' placeholder or similar
- RADIUS dropdown: shows miles like '25 miles', '50 miles' - click to expand options
- PRICE filter: look for 'Min Price' or 'Price From' input field, usually shows dollar sign
- SORT dropdown: shows 'Sort by' with options like 'Recently Updated', 'Price Low to High'

WHAT TO NEVER CLICK:
- Large boat PHOTOS or image thumbnails - these open gallery views
- Social media icons (Facebook, Instagram squares) in footer
- Dealer name links or brand logos
- Heart/save icons on listings
- 'Contact Dealer' or 'Get Quote' buttons

STEPS:
1. Look for ZIP CODE input field (white box, may have placeholder text)
2. click() on the zip code input field
3. type_text('33101')
4. Look for RADIUS dropdown showing miles - click() on it
5. click() on '25 miles' option from the dropdown
6. Look for MIN PRICE input field - click() on it
7. type_text('35000')
8. Look for SORT dropdown - click() on it
9. click() on 'Recently Updated' or 'Newest First' option
10. VERIFICATION: Read the result count on the page - it should be LESS than 1000 listings after filters applied
11. If result count is still very high (5000+), filters were NOT properly applied - try again
12. done(success=true, summary='Miami area filters applied: ZIP 33101, 25 miles, $35k+ min price, sorted by newest')

ERROR HANDLERS:
- Cookie popup appears → click() on 'Accept' or 'OK' button once, then continue with filters
- Filter doesn't work → try clicking the filter element again, type slower
- Page loads slowly → wait 3 seconds between filter steps
- If filters fail completely → done(success=false, summary='Could not apply location/price filters')

Extract boat listing details from BoatTrader search results. Click on listing TITLES (not photos) to open detail pages, then extract data.

WHAT TO CLICK:
- LISTING TITLE TEXT: Blue hyperlinked text showing 'Year Make Model' below the photo - this opens the detail page
- NEVER click the large boat PHOTO itself - this opens a fullscreen gallery trap

WHAT TO NEVER CLICK:
- Large boat PHOTOS or thumbnails - opens '1 of 5' gallery view
- 'Contact Seller' buttons - opens popup forms
- 'Request Info' buttons - opens popup forms
- Social media icons in footer
- Dealer/brand logos or navigation menus

STEPS FOR EACH LISTING:
1. On search results page, locate a listing with blue title text showing Year/Make/Model
2. click() on the TITLE TEXT (not the photo) - this opens the detail page
3. IMMEDIATELY read the URL from the browser address bar at the top of the screen - looks like: boattrader.com/boat/year-make-model-id/
4. scroll(direction='down', amount=5) AGGRESSIVELY past the photo gallery
5. Continue scrolling down to find Description or Seller Notes section
6. Look for PHONE NUMBERS: (305)555-1234, 786-555-1234, 305.555.5678 format - 10+ digit numbers
7. NOT phone numbers: prices ($45,000), years (2020), zip codes (33101), model numbers (275HP)
8. Extract: Year, Make, Model, Price, Seller Name (if visible)
9. key_press(keys='alt+left') to return to search results
10. done(success=true, summary='Extracted: Year: 2018, Make: Sea Ray, Model: 240 Sundeck, Price: $42,500, URL: boattrader.com/boat/2018-sea-ray-240-sundeck-12345/, Phone: 305-555-1234, Seller: John Smith')

PHONE NUMBER EXTRACTION:
- Phone numbers are the HIGHEST VALUE field for lead generation
- Scroll DOWN aggressively - phones are often 5-6 scrolls below photos
- Look in Description, Seller Notes, Additional Info sections
- Format: 'Phone: 305-555-1234' or 'Phone: none' - never omit this field
- Do NOT click contact buttons - they hide actual phone numbers

OUTPUT FORMAT:
- URL: [MANDATORY - read from browser address bar]
- Year: [4-digit year like 2018]
- Make: [Brand like Sea Ray, Boston Whaler]
- Model: [Model name like 240 Sundeck]
- Price: [Dollar amount like $42,500]
- Phone: [10-digit number like 305-555-1234 or 'none']
- Seller: [Name if visible, or 'not shown']

DO NOT output template text like 'Year: <from title>' - output actual values like 'Year: 2018'

ERROR HANDLERS:
- Photo gallery opens (shows '1 of N') → key_press(keys='Escape'), key_press(keys='alt+left')
- 404 page → key_press(keys='alt+left'), done(summary='SKIPPED | 404 error')
- Navigated to different site → key_press(keys='alt+left')
- No phone found after scrolling → still extract other data, output 'Phone: none'

loop.pagination_intent: After processing all listings on current page, scroll to bottom and click 'Next' or 'Next Page' button. If no Next button visible, pagination complete.
